zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Margaret Masterson於1603年9月28日出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾德列索普 哥吉拉 沙智時，她的父親Robert Masterson37歲，母親Margaret Agnes Holmes26歲。她和Richard Ormsby至少有1個女兒。她去世於1639年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克享年36歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克。

nameMeanings.name: Masterson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English maister ‘master’ + -son. Compare Master .
Irish: in Ireland, this is usually the English name in 1 above. However, it was also adopted for Irish Mac an Mháighistir ‘son of the master’, also Anglicized as McMaster .

variants.name: Master
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Amar, Dhimant, Pravin, Amit, Aruna, Bhanu, Gaurang, Gopal, Haren, Jagu, Jayesh, Kalpesh.

English: occupational name from Middle English maister ‘master’ (Old French maistre). The word had a wide range of applications, and the reference in surnames may be to a schoolmaster, to the master of a farm or house, to the master of an apprentice, or to a ship's captain. In Scotland the eldest sons of barons and the uncles of lords were called Masters, but this is not primarily a Scottish surname.
German: dialect form of   Meister   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: McMaster
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Mháighistir ‘son of the master’, meaning ‘teacher’ or ‘cleric’. It could also be applied in the sense of ‘lord’ or ‘owner’. This name was sometimes Anglicized as Masterson .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Margaret Masterson was born on 28 September 1603, in Theddlethorpe All Saints, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Masterson, was 37 and her mother, Margaret Agnes Holmes, was 26. She had at least 1 daughter with Richard Ormsby. She died in 1639, in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, at the age of 36, and was buried in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Margaret Masterson est née le 28 septembre 1603, à Theddlethorpe All Saints, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Masterson, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margaret Agnes Holmes, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Richard Ormsby. Elle est décédée en 1639, à York, Province of Maine, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à York, Province of Maine, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Margaret Masterson am 28. September 1603 in Theddlethorpe All Saints, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Masterson 37 und ihre Mutter Margaret Agnes Holmes 26. Sie hatte mit Richard Ormsby mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1639 im Alter von 36 Jahren in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America und wurde in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Margaret Mastersonが1603年9月28日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスエッドレソルペ アル サインツで生まれた時，父Robert Mastersonは37歳，母Margaret Agnes Holmesは26歳であった。彼女はRichard Ormsbyとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1639年にイギリス植民地アメリカプロヴィンス オフ メインヨークで36歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカプロヴィンス オフ メインヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Margaret Masterson(이)가 1603년 9월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 테들레소 앨 세인츠에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Masterson(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Agnes Holmes(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Richard Ormsby(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1639년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹 요르크에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹 요르크에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Margaret Masterson родилась 28 сентября 1603 г. в местности теддлетаурп алл сеинц, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Masterson было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Agnes Holmes, 26. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Richard Ormsby. Она умерла в 1639 г. в местности ерк, провинц оф меин, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности ерк, провинц оф меин, бритиш колоняль амирика.
